title: Duolingo Allay
description: Turns the allay and vex into Duo
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)



Soooooo... Duo the owl just died.... RIP lil' fella, we'll never forget you and the war crimes you commited. To celebra- uhhh I mean to immortalize the kidnapping owl, I made this resource pack.

This pack replaces the vex and allay with Duo.

Download it now or square Duo will come get you...
